narrative:
Harrison Twp township has 6,959 registered voters, with 50.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.6 percentage points.
